description: Create and manage cinematic AI video renders through the Future Video Studio Agent API.
name: video.future/future-video-studio

headers.description: Optional Future Video Studio Agent API key from Settings > Agent API Access. Omit for Link paid quote mode.
headers.name: X-FVS-Agent-Key

headers.description: Optional billing mode: account-wallet, marketplace-linked-account, or pay-per-render.
headers.name: X-FVS-Billing-Mode

headers.description: Optional linked marketplace account identifier for enterprise procurement flows.
headers.name: X-FVS-Marketplace-Account

headers.description: Optional marketplace entitlement identifier paired with X-FVS-Marketplace-Account.
headers.name: X-FVS-Marketplace-Entitlement

headers.description: Optional Unix timestamp used in marketplace signature verification.
headers.name: X-FVS-Marketplace-Timestamp

headers.description: Optional HMAC-SHA256 signature from the marketplace account-linking gateway.
headers.name: X-FVS-Marketplace-Signature

title: Future Video Studio
